identification_pearls: Regular rhythm, upright P before each QRS, rate 60-100.
treatment_considerations_by_level: EMT recognize normal monitor trend; paramedic interpret in clinical context.
ALS evaluates unstable bradycardia per protocol.

immediate_priorities: Search for cause: pain, fever, hypovolemia, anxiety, hypoxia.

identification_pearls: Irregularly irregular rhythm without consistent P waves.
common_confusions: Atrial flutter with variable conduction, artifact
immediate_priorities: Assess rate, perfusion, chest pain, stroke risk.
Treat as VT if uncertain and unstable.

identification_pearls: ST elevation in inferior leads, reciprocal changes possible.
immediate_priorities: Aspirin if allowed, transmit, STEMI alert per protocol.

identification_pearls: Tall peaked T waves, widening QRS in severe cases.
